file.content:
- name: Update apt cache
  apt:
    update_cache: true
    cache_valid_time: 3600

- name: Install base packages
  apt:
    name:
      - build-essential
      - curl
      - wget
      - git
      - unzip
      - jq
      - bc
      - htop
      - tmux
      - ripgrep
      - fd-find
      - make
      - cmake
      - pkg-config
      - ca-certificates
      - gnupg
      - lsb-release
      - software-properties-common
      - apt-transport-https
      - keychain
      - locales
      - net-tools
      - socat
      - snapd
      - bubblewrap
      - xauth
    state: present

- name: Install glow via snap
  community.general.snap:
    name: glow
    state: present

- name: Generate locale
  locale_gen:
    name: en_US.UTF-8
    state: present

- name: Set default locale
  lineinfile:
    path: /etc/default/locale
    regexp: "^LANG="
    line: "LANG=en_US.UTF-8"
    create: true

- name: Set hostname
  hostname:
    name: "{{ hostname }}"
  when: hostname | length > 0

- name: Add hostname to /etc/hosts
  lineinfile:
    path: /etc/hosts
    regexp: '^\s*127\.0\.1\.1\s'
    line: "127.0.1.1 {{ hostname }}"
  when: hostname | length > 0

- name: Persist hostname in wsl.conf
  blockinfile:
    path: /etc/wsl.conf
    block: |
      [network]
      hostname = {{ hostname }}
    marker: "# {mark} ANSIBLE MANAGED - hostname"
  when: hostname | length > 0

- name: Set timezone
  community.general.timezone:
    name: "{{ timezone }}"

file.content:
# Browser dependencies for headed Playwright under WSLg.
# WSLg provides the Wayland/X11 compositor — we just need the libraries.

- name: Install Playwright browser dependencies
  apt:
    name:
      # GTK / rendering
      - libgtk-3-0t64
      - libgtk-4-1
      - libgraphene-1.0-0
      - libnotify4
      - libnss3
      - libxss1
      - libxtst6
      - libatk-bridge2.0-0t64
      - libdrm2
      - libxcomposite1
      - libxdamage1
      - libxrandr2
      - libgbm1
      - libpango-1.0-0
      - libcairo2
      - libcups2
      - libxkbcommon0
      - libatspi2.0-0t64
      # GStreamer (WebKit/video support)
      - libevent-2.1-7t64
      - libopus0
      - libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-0
      - libgstreamer-gl1.0-0
      - libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-0
      - gstreamer1.0-plugins-good
      # Flite (speech synthesis for WebKit)
      - flite1-dev
      # Image codecs
      - libwebpdemux2
      - libavif16
      - libharfbuzz-icu0
      - libwebpmux3
      # Wayland
      - libwayland-server0
      # Other WebKit deps
      - libmanette-0.2-0
      - libenchant-2-2
      - libhyphen0
      - libsecret-1-0
      - libwoff1
      - libgles2
      - libx264-dev
      # Audio (some browser features require it)
      - libasound2t64
      # Fonts
      - fonts-liberation
      - fonts-noto-color-emoji
      # D-Bus (browser IPC under WSLg)
      - dbus
    state: present

- name: Install browsers for Playwright via snap
  community.general.snap:
    name:
      - firefox
      - chromium
    state: present

- name: Ensure DISPLAY is set for graphical apps
  copy:
    dest: /etc/profile.d/wslg.sh
    content: |
      # Set DISPLAY for graphical apps.
      # - WSLg local sessions: uses :0 (Wayland/X11 compositor)
      # - SSH X11 forwarding:  sshd sets DISPLAY automatically (e.g. localhost:10.0)
      export DISPLAY="${DISPLAY:-:0}"
    mode: "0644"

file.content:
- name: Add NodeSource GPG key
  get_url:
    url: https://deb.nodesource.com/gpgkey/nodesource-repo.gpg.key
    dest: /etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.asc
    mode: "0644"

- name: Add NodeSource repository
  apt_repository:
    repo: >-
      deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nodesource.asc]
      https://deb.nodesource.com/node_{{ node_version }}.x nodistro main
    filename: nodesource

- name: Install Node.js
  apt:
    name: nodejs
    state: present
    update_cache: true

- name: Install pnpm globally
  npm:
    name: pnpm
    global: true
    version: "{{ pnpm_version }}"
    state: present

file.content:
- name: Provision development environment
  hosts: localhost
  connection: local
  become: true
  vars_files:
    - vars/main.yml

  roles:
    - base
    - docker
    - golang
    - rust
    - nodejs
    - python
    - postgresql
    - playwright
    - ssh
    - github-cli
    - netbird
    - project-tools
    - user

content.text: The `playwright` role currently only installs system dependencies and browsers via snap. I'll add a task to install `@playwright/cli@latest` globally via npm (which is available since `nodejs` runs before `playwright` in the playbook).

input.old_string: - name: Install browsers for Playwright via snap
input.new_string:
- name: Install Playwright CLI globally
  npm:
    name: "@playwright/cli"
    global: true
    state: latest

- name: Install browsers for Playwright via snap

# Browser dependencies for headed Playwright under WSLg.
# WSLg provides the Wayland/X11 compositor — we just need the libraries.

- name: Install Playwright browser dependencies
  apt:
    name:
      # GTK / rendering
      - libgtk-3-0t64
      - libgtk-4-1
      - libgraphene-1.0-0
      - libnotify4
      - libnss3
      - libxss1
      - libxtst6
      - libatk-bridge2.0-0t64
      - libdrm2
      - libxcomposite1
      - libxdamage1
      - libxrandr2
      - libgbm1
      - libpango-1.0-0
      - libcairo2
      - libcups2
      - libxkbcommon0
      - libatspi2.0-0t64
      # GStreamer (WebKit/video support)
      - libevent-2.1-7t64
      - libopus0
      - libgstreamer-plugins-base1.0-0
      - libgstreamer-gl1.0-0
      - libgstreamer-plugins-bad1.0-0
      - gstreamer1.0-plugins-good
      # Flite (speech synthesis for WebKit)
      - flite1-dev
      # Image codecs
      - libwebpdemux2
      - libavif16
      - libharfbuzz-icu0
      - libwebpmux3
      # Wayland
      - libwayland-server0
      # Other WebKit deps
      - libmanette-0.2-0
      - libenchant-2-2
      - libhyphen0
      - libsecret-1-0
      - libwoff1
      - libgles2
      - libx264-dev
      # Audio (some browser features require it)
      - libasound2t64
      # Fonts
      - fonts-liberation
      - fonts-noto-color-emoji
      # D-Bus (browser IPC under WSLg)
      - dbus
    state: present

- name: Install browsers for Playwright via snap
  community.general.snap:
    name:
      - firefox
      - chromium
    state: present

- name: Ensure DISPLAY is set for graphical apps
  copy:
    dest: /etc/profile.d/wslg.sh
    content: |
      # Set DISPLAY for graphical apps.
      # - WSLg local sessions: uses :0 (Wayland/X11 compositor)
      # - SSH X11 forwarding:  sshd sets DISPLAY automatically (e.g. localhost:10.0)
      export DISPLAY="${DISPLAY:-:0}"
    mode: "0644"
